name: GOLFTEC Palm Beach Gardens
address: 11320 Legacy Ave G-120, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33410
about: GOLFTEC Palm Beach Gardens is a golf training studio focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. The facility utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized feedback and improvement strategies for golfers of all skill levels. Services include private lessons, practice memberships, and custom club fittings with equipment from major brands like Callaway and TaylorMade. The center emphasizes structured learning through swing evaluations, personalized game plans, and ongoing support from certified PGA coaches.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provides precise swing analysis
PGA-certified coaches offer personalized improvement strategies based on data feedback
Custom club fittings add an average of 21 yards off the tee with professional fitting services

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides club rentals for lessons and fittings. For practice sessions, you can use your own clubs or rent equipment from the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks to the facility?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC does not have food or beverage services available. The studio is focused on training and coaching services without dining facilities.

faq.question: How long does it take to complete 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator play time varies depending on the number of players and pace of play. Typically, 18 holes takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of participants and game format.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly for junior golfers?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC welcomes junior golfers with age-appropriate instruction and technology. The facility offers junior programs with specialized coaching using video analysis and launch monitors to help young golfers improve their skills.
